$comment: TKT-268 / PLAN-011 checked auth/retry client inventory. Single source of truth for BOTH the shared Python behavioural conformance harness (services/functions/_authconf/conformance.py, via each service's tests/test_auth_conformance.py) and the node drift guard (scripts/checks/check-auth-inventory.mjs). 'claims' is the subset of the four observable behaviours each client actually pins; the harness asserts each claimed behaviour AND the complement where observable. 'excluded' rows are auth-bearing callers that deliberately implement none of the four (or a non-retry poll) — recorded so a future retry/refresh cannot slip in unpinned. See ADR-0032.

clients.authMechanism: Box JWT (Server Authentication) assertion exchanged at /oauth2/token
clients.note: Also retries the token MINT on transient status (distinct from blob_source).

clients.authMechanism: Azure managed-identity storage bearer via the Functions MSI REST endpoint
clients.note: Wall-clock (time.time vs expires_on) expiry, NOT a monotonic deadline; no transient-retry on the blob GET or the mint.

clients.authMechanism: Managed-identity client-credentials bearer for the Data API audience (azure-identity)
clients.note: Expiry awareness is internal to azure-identity and NOT observable here, so expiry-aware-reuse is deliberately NOT claimed. The only client that honours Retry-After (delta-seconds, capped).
Monotonic deadline; expires_in is in MINUTES.
Retry is triggered by transient HTTP status OR a documented retryable errorCode.

clients.authMechanism: Static API key (x-api-key); no token acquisition
clients.note: No token, so no expiry/refresh; 400/404 short-circuit before the retry check.

clients.authMechanism: Keyless managed-identity Cognitive-Services token minted once at build time
clients.note: RETAINED-BUT-NOT-EXPIRY-AWARE bearer (flagged): mints once, reuses for the object's lifetime, never tracks expiry, never refreshes, never retries — any non-200 degrades to []. claims:[] pins the ABSENCE of all four.

excluded.reason: Offline diagnostic tool (not a runtime client). Duplicates the Box JWT mint shape but has no token cache, 401-refresh, or transient retry.
API-key REST caller (Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key); no token, no expiry cache, no refresh, no transient retry.
API-key REST caller (subscription-key); no token, no expiry cache, no refresh, no transient retry.
Document Intelligence LRO status-poll (202 -> Operation-Location -> poll), which is not a token/401-refresh or a transient (429/5xx) retry.
